name: database-connection-lifecycle
description: Bun.sql connections need lifecycle management. In MCP server context: (1) Long-lived server process, (2) Multiple Claude sessions may connect/disconnect, (3) Connection pooling may be needed for concurrent queries. Risk: Connection leaks if not properly managed. Mitigation: BunSqlExecutor should handle connect/disconnect lifecycle, db.connect tool establishes connection, stores reference in MCP server state.
recommendation: Add connection state management to packages/mcp/src/state.ts. BunSqlExecutor takes connection as constructor param. db.connect creates connection and stores globally in MCP server state.
